title: Add spec runner tool
description: Create a tool script to run all Gherkin specs for Python and Rust and report results plus coverage in a single summary.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added tools/run_specs.py to run Python Behave with coverage, Rust cucumber tests, and cargo-tarpaulin coverage with a JSON summary. Includes --skip-rust-coverage flag.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Ran tools/run_specs.py after updating coverage --source. Python ok with 100% coverage. Rust specs ok. Rust coverage failed because cargo-tarpaulin is not installed; tool reports the error and exits 1 unless --skip-rust-coverage is used.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Updated tools/run_specs.py to scope Python coverage to taskulus and to read rust/cobertura.xml from cargo-tarpaulin. Added rust coverage error reporting in JSON summary.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Updated tools/run_specs.py to run cargo tarpaulin with engine llvm, run-types Tests, test cucumber, implicit test threads, and exclude src/bin/*. Rust coverage still reports ~0.3%.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Tool runs Python behave with coverage and Rust cucumber tests; prints summary including pass/fail and coverage metrics.
